descriptionTemplate: When choosing {Usurp}, the Base DMG of {Blade's Dominion} placed in hand +400%, and its Arithmetica Cost becomes 0. When choosing {Dormancy}, do not place {Blade's Dominion}; instead, add 2 copies of {Decapitation Damage} to your hand, granting them the effects of {Exhaust}, {Prepare 1}, and {Retain}.
